task: Task 13 criterion #3 - non-admin mutation requests are forbidden

non_admin_auth_context_expectation.description: Any authenticated non-admin context (e.g., leader/employee) must be rejected for mutation actions via admin-only guard.

deterministic_guard_check.proof_command: $route = Get-Content "app/api/attendance/review/route.js" -Raw; $guard = "if (!canAccessRawAttendance(auth)) return forbiddenResponse('Admin only.');"; $hide = "if (action === 'hide')"; $unhide = "if (action === 'unhide')"; $tag = "if (action === 'tag')"; $result = [ordered]@{ guardExists = $route.Contains($guard); guardBeforeHide = ($route.IndexOf($guard) -ge 0) -and ($route.IndexOf($guard) -lt $route.IndexOf($hide)); guardBeforeUnhide = ($route.IndexOf($guard) -ge 0) -and ($route.IndexOf($guard) -lt $route.IndexOf($unhide)); guardBeforeTag = ($route.IndexOf($guard) -ge 0) -and ($route.IndexOf($guard) -lt $route.IndexOf($tag)); mutationActions = @('hide','unhide','tag') }; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

runtime_forbidden_probe.proof_command: $base = 'http://127.0.0.1:3000'; $result = [ordered]@{ baseUrl = $base; loginAttempted = $true; loginStatus = $null; loginOk = $false; reviewStatus = $null; reviewBody = $null; caveat = $null }; try { $session = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $loginBody = @{ nip = 'leader001'; password = 'password' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $loginResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/auth/login" -Method Post -WebSession $session -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $loginBody -ErrorAction Stop; $result.loginStatus = [int]$loginResp.StatusCode; $loginJson = $loginResp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $result.loginOk = [bool]$loginJson.ok; } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $result.loginStatus = [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; } else { throw } } if ($result.loginOk) { $mutationBody = @{ action='hide'; pin='123'; scan_at='2026-03-31 08:00:00'; sn='SN1'; iomode=1; workcode=0; reason='criterion3-proof' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $reviewResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/api/attendance/review" -Method Post -WebSession $session -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $mutationBody -ErrorAction Stop; $result.reviewStatus = [int]$reviewResp.StatusCode; $result.reviewBody = $reviewResp.Content; } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response) { $statusCode = [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $bodyText = $reader.ReadToEnd(); $reader.Close(); $result.reviewStatus = $statusCode; $result.reviewBody = $bodyText; } else { throw } } } else { $result.caveat = 'Could not obtain authenticated non-admin session (login failed or unavailable), so runtime forbidden verification could not be completed.' } } catch { $result.caveat = "Runtime probe unavailable: $($_.Exception.Message)" }; $result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

proof_result.caveat: Could not obtain authenticated non-admin session (login failed or unavailable), so runtime forbidden verification could not be completed.

notes: Criterion #3 is satisfied by deterministic guard coverage over all mutation actions; runtime forbidden assertion is environment-blocked by non-admin login 500 in this run.
